programme.desc: Mary takes Dick along with her on a visit to her parents, and he accidentally reveals a secret from their past. Meanwhile, Sally temporarily moves in with Nina. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Jane Curtin, Kristen Johnston, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and French Stewart(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Part two of two. The healing process begins for House, as he finally accepts he needs help to deal with his problems. However, adjusting to living without Vicodin proves to be a sizeable challenge. Medical drama starring Hugh Laurie, with guest stars Andre Braugher, Lin-Manuel Miranda and Franka Potente(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic announces that he will make big changes to his lifestyle when he returns to Princeton-Plainsboro, but when he gets home he finds a bottle of Vicodin. The team struggles to diagnose a patient who posts all of his symptoms on the internet(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The experiences of some of the programme's most memorable characters as they deal with Christmas on benefits. Single mother Marie struggles to buy presents for her eight children, but receives good news about a move to a bigger housing association home in Birmingham, while best mates Bennett and Stevo rummage through bins for the food that shops in Nuneaton throw away. What Christmas treats will they uncover for their festive feast?(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays(n)

Hugh Laurie and Olivia Wilde star(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The team disagrees on how to treat a college football player who wants to be cured in time to compete in the NFL tryouts, and Foreman's brother Marcus pays a visit. Hugh Laurie, Omar Epps and Orlando Jones star(n)

programme.desc: Documentary about people who will stop at nothing to outdo their children or grandchildren in the fashion and beauty stakes, finding out whether they are a source of embarrassment or pride for their nearest and dearest. Maruga has taught her twins everything they know and claims they are the Kardashians of the UK, while Amanda loves to compare herself to her much younger 18-year-old granddaughter and Chris is always competing with his daughter Megan on their nights out(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Botched Up Bodies
programme.desc: After a breast operation, reality TV star Natalee Harris was unhappy with the size, shape and symmetry - and to make matters worse, it left her suffering constant back pain. Now she visits a surgeon to see if he can give her a new more perky pair. The film also meets former page three model Tracy Kirby, who was left scarred both physically and emotionally by an unsuccessful facelift, and 21-year-old Katie Price wannabe Nathan Thursfield, who has spent £40,000 to look like his idol. Plus, a comparison of actor John Travolta as he looked in his 20s with how he appears now as a 62-year-old movie veteran(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: An African dictator who has been charged with crimes against humanity is brought in for treatment, causing a moral dilemma for the staff. programme.title: House
programme.desc: A boy suffering from mysterious stomach pains is brought into the hospital by his oil executive father, who believes that the illness is punishment for his financial successes. Meanwhile, Foreman and Chase prepare a presentation on the Dibala case. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary following the inhabitants of the seaside village of Jaywick in Essex, where more than half of the residents are on state welfare. Tony Taylor claims £51.40 a week and does odd jobs in exchange for food, enabling his benefits money to go a bit further, while Claire has moved from east London's Canning Town in search of a better life with her fiance Luke, their young baby and her two older children, who live with a host of pets in a two-bedroom house(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmore are met with lies and aggression when they track down nearly £3,000 owed by a garage mechanic, while Steve and Ben encounter a retired couple who are being forced to leave their home. Stuart and Vic revisit a young debtor who owe £750 for a laptop computer, and in Oxfordshire, Paul and Steve chase £30,000 owed by a world-famous Formula One racing team(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Dr Lisa Cuddy experiences a particularly stressful day as she deals with staff and hospital issues that test her skills as an administrator - on top of her busy personal life. Medical drama, starring Lisa Edelstein and Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: After taking on the case of an enthusiastic blogger, House and the team debate the value of privacy. Elsewhere, Chase is coaxed back on to the dating scene. Medical drama, starring Olivia Wilde and Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of unemployed people visits Hull, which has one of the highest unemployment rates and lowest average weekly wages in the UK. Rebecca is 16 and expecting her first baby with 17-year-old boyfriend Sonny, who is adamant he will be in work by the time the child arrives, while her foster mother Anita is concerned she will be unable to afford her house when her children move out. Gordon has not worked in decades and has very strong political views as to why employment has eluded him and many others in the north of England(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of individuals on the dole in the UK follows the stories of Roma people who moved to the UK and are now surviving on payments from the welfare state. Ion is from Romania and wants to make £40,000 from benefits to help him build a new house for his family back in his home village, while Katarina arrived from Slovakia seven years ago and has 11 children and 11 grandchildren living in and around an estate in Rotherham, South Yorkshire. Nottingham resident Viorel is 25 and lost both legs in an accident in his native Romania when he was seven, and now wants to pursue a career in the movies(n)

programme.title: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: After the traumatic birth of her first-born son, 36-year-old Michelle is determined to have an easier time with her second, but scans reveal their baby could be bigger than average(n)

programme.title: Benefits
programme.desc: Cheryl Prudham has 11 children and collects nearly £40,000 per year in various state benefits and is constantly in the newspapers. But what is her life really like? This documentary follows Cheryl and her family as they deal with life on welfare and the impending arrival of child number 12(n)

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A married lawyer has a one-night stand with a business associate while his wife and children are out of town. He hopes to keep his infidelity a secret, but she is determined to continue the relationship, and begins obsessively stalking him and his unsuspecting family. Thriller, starring Michael Douglas, Glenn Close and Anne Archer(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team uncover the lair of serial murderer the 'Compass Killer' while investigating how he escaped from the World's Fair site in Queens. Stella learns he is targeting people whom he imagines could have been responsible for his wife's death, and the case becomes a race against time to find out who will be the fourth victim. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Columbo: It's All in the Game (1993)
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite and her daughter discover they have been seeing the same man, and have him killed. When Columbo investigates the case, the mother is determined to make sure all his attention is on her and not her daughter, and an unlikely romance develops between sleuth and suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Faye Dunaway(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Candidate for Crime (1973)
programme.desc: An ambitious senatorial candidate murders his campaign manager for threatening to expose his secret affair. To avoid suspicion, the politician makes the killing look as if he was the intended target of an assassination attempt that went wrong - but ends up having to pit his wits against the slovenly sleuth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling(n)

programme.title: Columbo: By Dawn's Early Light (1974)
programme.desc: The commandant of a military academy is outraged by the chairman of the board's plans to admit female cadets, so he stages a fatal accident involving a ceremonial cannon. However, Columbo is not fooled by the deception and sets out to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Patrick McGoohan, Tom Simcox and Mark Wheeler(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Double Shock (1973)
programme.desc: A wealthy man due to marry a younger woman is electrocuted in the bath. Columbo suspects the victim's identical twin nephews - a flamboyant TV chef and a conservative banker - who stand to inherit his fortune if he died unmarried, but the detective is unsure which of them is the guilty party. Drama, starring Peter Falk, and Martin Landau in a dual role. With Paul Stewart, Julie Newmar and Jeanette Nolan(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Case of Immunity (1975)
programme.desc: A senior adviser to the king of a Middle Eastern nation plots to increase his own power by having the head of security at their American embassy killed and placing the blame on a group of dissidents. Columbo is assigned to crack the case, but the suspect's diplomatic immunity hinders the progress of the investigation. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Hector Elizondo and Sal Mineo(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a surgeon who provided deaf patients with controversial cochlear implants. After ruling out the involvement of a rival doctor, the detectives suspect a radical deaf playwright may be responsible for the crime. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team is caught in a contentious political battle as public protests over the recent hate crime turn violent(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson are assigned the case of a taxi driver found stabbed to death, and it soon emerges that the victim had a selection of false identities, leading the cops on a wild goose chase before they uncover any concrete leads. First episode of the spin-off drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Richard Belzer(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is drugged and raped while working behind the bar at a party for a billionaire businessman(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman makes a false accusation, leaving her son faced with a deadly choice. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead by a neighbour, a conspiracy unfolds when detectives discover her boyfriend has also been murdered - with his body placed beneath his house. The lines of inquiry lead to Prop 128, a religious ballot to ban gay marriage, which the second victim was campaigning to pass. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a mass shooting occurs at a primarily Hispanic mortgage office, Winters and Jaruszalski begin begin investigating the surviving employees, in addition to their clients. When the case finally reaches court after a potential suspect is arrested, DDAs Dekker and Stanton confront the defendant's lawyer who claims that the team has allowed racial factors to influence its investigation. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a truck driver is shot dead, detectives Fontana and Green learn the victim was transporting illegal immigrants across the Mexican border and suspect a member of a citizens' patrol group was responsible for his death. However, their only witness is a Hispanic woman who risks deportation if she testifies(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac's motor racing hero dies in an explosion during an exhibition event and investigations reveal someone had tampered with his car. Unfortunately, the detectives face an ever-increasing list of suspects as they discover conflicting evidence about who could have sabotaged it. Crime drama, guest starring Antonio Sabato Jr, with Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The team has difficulty portraying a surgeon with a God complex as a sympathetic figure for the jury, so Bull hires Liberty Davis - a previous client's attorney - to help(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man with a history of violence is arrested for the murder of his son's school ice-hockey coach, but pleads mitigating circumstances. Helped by a glib defence lawyer, he claims that he committed the crime while suffering from a previously unknown mental condition he calls 'sports rage'(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of four bodies in a jeweller's shop. Suspicion soon falls on the husband of one of the victims, who is revealed to have changed his identity to escape a shady past. The shop's security tapes are subsequently discovered in his flat, but the defendant surprises everyone by insisting on representing himself in court - and makes a big impression on the jury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The bloody trail of an elusive killer leads detectives Fontana and Green to a hit-list of names all connected to the trial of jailed multiple murderer Leland Barnes. McCoy soon realises Barnes has hired someone to kill the only people who can keep him in prison - and puts his own life on the line to see that justice is done(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The facially scarred daughter of Lieutenant Van Buren's college friend is found dead, putting Fontana and Green on the trail of the assailant who had thrown acid in the victim's face months earlier. Meanwhile, ADA McCoy's prosecution is complicated by Van Buren's desperation(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a couple found dead in their apartment, following a trail of drugs and money to the wife of an army officer responsible for anti-narcotics operations in Colombia. Despite the woman's reluctance to co-operate with the police, McCoy convinces her she has no choice but to risk her life in a bid to catch the murderer. Charlotte d'Amboise guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a Hispanic man found dead from a severe chest trauma after being involved in a staged car accident with two other illegal immigrants - and soon find evidence linking similar incidents with the same employer, chiropractor and insurance adjuster. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An undercover policewoman is murdered, and the team is charged with finding out how her cover was blown. Following a series of revelations, the investigation leads to a worker in a prominent congressman's office - but the suspect has a seemingly watertight alibi. Legal drama, starring Sam Waterston, Dennis Farina and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detective Falco spends an evening on the town and goes home with a woman he meets in a bar. Unfortunately, when he wakes up the next morning, he does not just have a hangover to contend with - his conquest has been stabbed to death in the bathroom, and he is the main suspect. Starring Michael Imperioli, Jesse L Martin and Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Kyle Friedgen is accused of killing his ex-girlfriend, but while his case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant, his life and reputation are marred by suspicion that he got away with murder. Determined to clear his name in full, Friedgen volunteers to be court-martialed, on the condition that the NCIS team conducts its own investigation. Meanwhile, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems. Naval crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham, with Jamie Bamber(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A married astronaut is suspected of killing his lover, a female colleague who was murdered while speaking at a conference - but Goren and the team also have to consider that she may have been killed by a rival whose seat she took on a future mission. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe, with Tate Donovan and Amy Ryan(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The officers are called in to investigate when a successful newspaper columnist falls six storeys to her death, dressed only in her underwear. It soon emerges her psychiatrist had visited the apartment that day for dinner, but he seems reluctant to tell the police what went on, making them believe he could be hiding vital clues. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A teenage model is raped, assaulted with a hammer and left for dead outside a hospital, and is also found to have taken amphetamines. A photographer and his business partner are soon arrested for the crime - but finding a motive proves harder than anticipated. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates a youth hockey team, where bullying of new players has taken a dangerous turn(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin revisits his military roots when a fellow Army ranger struggles to recover from a sexual assault. Sarah Booth guest stars, with Ice T and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A serial murder at a birthday party leads the detectives to the pornography underworld. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When the brother of a female soccer star is murdered, Winters and Jaruszalski discover he had been trying to protect his sister. However, during the investigation new evidence is discovered that threatens to lead them away from their suspect, which leaves Morales and Price with little time to determine what really happened before the case goes before a jury(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Nick visits Stafford to meet seasoned CCTV operator and ex-police officer Barbara, who helps catch a drug user after spotting him on camera. Plus, control room operative Chris is on the lookout for regular shoplifters in Woking, while mild-mannered Jo foils a gang of thieves in Huntingdonshire(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica receives a plea for help from an old friend who fears she may be going out of her mind, convinced she is being haunted by the ghost of her first husband. When the woman's current beau turns up dead, the sleuth goes on a mission to prove her innocence. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The legal advisor returns to his childhood home to help a young man whose connection to the town reflects his own(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Animal rights activists are implicated in the death of an Aids researcher killed by a bite from an infected monkey, and use the ensuing court case to drum up support for their cause. As events unfold, McCoy and Carmichael find themselves debating ethics with lawyers who argue the protection of animal life is a valid defence in a murder case(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a Central Park lake during a Puerto Rican Day parade. The victim turns out to be the wife of a powerful billionaire, and pressure is put on the police to find the culprit quickly. Suspicion falls on the business partner of the victim's husband and a witness comes forward to identify him, making everything seem clear cut - but not for long(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is mysteriously killed after desecrating a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah, brought from Poland to America. Detectives follow the trail to a man who confesses to the murder, but explains that his cousin paid the victim to defile the book. As ADA McCoy probes the family feud, he learns it may be linked to a lucrative property sale. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston, Allan Miller, Zach Grenier and Mark Feuerstein(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A retired cop exacts rough justice and kills the small-time thug responsible for fatally stabbing a Mob accountant, but tries to avoid going to trial by admitting he falsified evidence during his time on the force - a potentially damaging confession that could jeopardise many previous convictions. Guest starring Amy Ryan (The Wire, The Office: An American Workplace)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a student who proves to be the estranged son of a powerful real-estate tycoon. The finger of blame points to a mystery woman seen with the victim outside the college, and when tracked down, she claims to be his sister. However, Briscoe is not convinced, and suspects an extortion scheme(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are convinced that former career criminal Cally Lonegan has killed his business partner who had been stealing company money. However, their suspect has a cast iron alibi - he is a Mob informant and at the time of the murder was being followed by the FBI. The case takes a more complicated turn when an eyewitness is found dead and the detectives discover Lonegan has a twin brother(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A cop is murdered during a botched robbery, triggering an investigation that leads Green and Cassady to a paparazzo who may have compromising photos of a celebrity and her baby. The case later goes to trial, but proceedings are overshadowed by a debate about tabloid journalism. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Callers to the emergency services report seeing a photograph of a murdered woman on the internet, and when Green and Cassady investigate, they realise her clothes do not fit properly. They trace her unusual attire to a mentally disturbed man, who protests that the victim's daughter asked him to kill her mother. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The two Marine brothers of a sailor battling leukaemia are killed in the line of duty, and to spare the servicemen's family further grief, the secretary of the US Navy seeks the NCIS team's help in locating a suitable bone marrow donor. Meanwhile, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for Thanksgiving. Military crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: Keaton and the CoIntel team must locate a domestic target before Chigorin launches an all-out assault on unsuspecting innocents(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson investigate when the body of a murdered prostitute is found in Times Square, and are shocked at the insensitivity with which a cocky vice detective is handling the crime. Relieving him of duty, they soon link the woman's death to the murders of two other call girls, and start to believe a serial killer may be at work. Police drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An acclaimed travel writer is found murdered with underwear stuffed in his mouth, and the unassuming boyfriend of his landlady comes under suspicion. Meanwhile, a precocious girl shocks Stabler with her knowledge of sex, and makes him uncomfortable at the thought that his own 14-year-old daughter is on the verge of entering the dating scene. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets Hereford couple Colin and Clare Gibbons, whose life together fell apart in 2012 when their eldest son Christopher was diagnosed with Duchenne muscular dystrophy, one of the most severe forms of the condition. Despite having a lovely house, it needs adapting to Christopher's needs for both now and in the future, so the DIY SOS team - bolstered by dozens of local tradespeople - descend on the property to add a two-storey extension, with designer Julia Kendell on hand to ensure they stick to her vision while adding a few finishing touches of her own(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Warrington, Cheshire, to meet electrician Dave McCartney, a healthy man until he had a stroke at work that has left him partially paralysed. Now he is forced to sleep in a hospital bed in his kitchen - but it won't be for much longer, as his old workmates team up with the DIY SOS builders and other members of the local community to adapt his home to his needs, with designer Charlie Luxton on hand to keep the boys in check(n)

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of struggling musician David Evans, who was imprisoned in the notorious Los Teques jail in Venezuela for trying to smuggle cocaine out of the country. programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. programme.desc: Jamie Oliver's Feed Me Better campaign seems to be heading off the rails, with only 20 per cent of the teenagers eating his nutritious meals. programme.title: Time Without Pity (1957)
programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings(n)
